title: Xero cloud accounting
body: We will configure and maintain your Xero organisation, including chart of accounts, bank feeds, and MTD-compatible VAT settings. Xero subscription fees are billed separately by Xero.

title: Dext document capture
body: We will implement Dext for automated receipt and invoice capture, including supplier rules and publishing workflows to your accounting software.

title: Client software obligations
body: You are responsible for maintaining subscriptions to third-party software and granting us appropriate user access to complete the agreed services.

title: Software licences and retention of title
body: Where we pay for Xero (or other cloud accounting software) on your behalf as part of this engagement, the subscription and associated licences remain our property until all fees due under this engagement have been paid in full. On completion or termination of the engagement, transfer of the subscription into your name is conditional upon settlement of all outstanding amounts.
